Meta.Documentation: An aggregation, migration, substitution, dependency or exclusivity relationship between/among Characteristic specifications. The specification characteristic is embedded within the specification whose ID and href are in this entity, and identified by its ID.
Unique identifier of the characteristic within the specification
Name of the target characteristic within the specification
Hyperlink reference to the parent specification containing the target characteristic format: uri
Unique identifier of the parent specification containing the target characteristic
Type of relationship such as aggregation, migration, substitution, dependency, exclusivity
When sub-classing, this defines the super-class
A URI to a JSON-Schema file that defines additional attributes and relationships format: uri
When sub-classing, this defines the sub-class Extensible name
